name: Bake-it-All-Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sifted flour, salt, and baking powder in a large bowl or pan.
2. Stir well to combine.
3. Add the vegetable shortening.
4. Use a pastry blender to distribute the shortening throughout the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal and small peas.
Notes:
The Bake-It-All Mix is ready to use or can be stored in a sealed container on your cupboard shelf. A cool area is desirable. Yield: About 12 cups.
This mix was originally from a company called Jewel, but their product may no longer be available. I have had excellent results using Crisco or Mazola shortening instead. Unfortunately, the original Jewel shortening has been discontinued.
4 tablespoons
